name: Innocent
description: seeks safety, simplicity, hope, purity, or return to an uncorrupted state

name: Everyman
description: ordinary person, relatable outsider, survivor, citizen, or non-exceptional figure

name: Hero
description: acts through courage, struggle, confrontation, sacrifice, or overcoming danger

name: Caregiver
description: protects, nurtures, rescues, takes responsibility for others or a community

name: Explorer
description: seeks freedom, discovery, movement, unknown places, or self-expansion

name: Rebel
description: resists authority, breaks rules, seeks revenge, disruption, liberation, or refusal

name: Lover
description: defined by intimacy, desire, attachment, emotional bonds, beauty, or devotion

name: Creator
description: builds, crafts, designs, invents, makes worlds, systems, art, or tools

name: Jester
description: uses play, comedy, absurdity, trickery, performance, or chaotic humor

name: Sage
description: seeks truth, knowledge, investigation, memory, interpretation, or understanding

name: Magician
description: transforms reality, self, systems, fate, magic, technology, or perception

name: Ruler
description: commands, governs, controls resources, leads factions, manages order or power
